content.en:
Origin Black Mud!

Although Ye Tian didn't know about this kind of treasure, it must be a good thing to be able to let the Lord of Ice and Rain say it!

The Lord of Ice and Rain continued: "This treasure of Origin Black Mud can be smeared on our body, and when we cultivate, we can refine our Origin Realm body and Origin Realm will in all aspects, and even when we comprehend the Origin Rules on the other side, the effect will be very good. The origin black mud is also known as the head of the origin of the black river kui treasure, the role is very large, many forces in the central part will enter the origin of the black river during the tidal period of the origin of the black river, looking for the origin of the black mud. "

"Refining the physical body, improving the will of the origin, and also assisting in the comprehension of the rules of the origin on the other side, a good thing!"

Ye Tian felt that this kind of origin black mud was simply a treasure to the extreme, who wouldn't want such a treasure?

However, during the tidal period of the Origin Black River, it is also very dangerous to find the Origin Black Mud in the Origin Black River, and it is difficult to stay in the Source Black River for a long time.

Ye Tian originally thought that the Lord of Ice and Rain was only talking about the matter of Origin Black Mud.

However, the Lord of Ice and Rain said one more thing.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said: "During the tidal period, a creature in the Origin Black River will not be able to sleep, and will inevitably wake up, this creature is the Origin Black Whale, and the whale oil of the Origin Black Whale will help to impact the middle stage of the Source Origin Realm......"

Under the introduction of the Lord of Ice and Rain, Ye Tian quickly knew the value of the Origin Black Whale.

Origin whale oil can make the other side of the origin boil, and the origin boiling is a necessary condition for impacting the origin of the middle realm.

After the other shore of the origin boils, with the help of the rules of the other side, it can trigger a transformation and step into the middle realm of the origin.

Any treasure that can cause the other side to boil is a priceless treasure and is very rare.

The whale oil of the Origin Black Whale is one of those treasures.

However, the strength of the Origin Black Whale is very strong, no less than the top Origin Lower Realm Peak Genius, and its combat power is strong.

If your strength is not good, it's best not to provoke such an Origin Black Whale, otherwise you will be looking for death!

"There are still six primeval eras, and the tidal period is coming, if you don't want to take the risk, stay on Frost Rain Island, and at that time, I will open a large array to protect Frost Rain Island. The Lord of Ice and Rain said.

"Yes!"

Many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors responded to the Dao.

......

Time passed, and six primeval eras passed in a flash.

Ye Tian's replica body on Wind Tooth Island naturally didn't go out, and he still stayed in the Eternal Origin Array on Icy Rain Island to comprehend the Origin Array on the other side, as if he was not interested in the tidal period of the Origin Black River at all.

In fact, his other replica bodies were already preparing to enter the Origin Black River in search of the Origin Black Mud and the Origin Black Whale.

And, at this time, another good thing came.

"The treasure of the other side has been bred!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

In the other side of the origin in his body, a spear gradually took shape, exuding terrifying power.

"I also have a treasure from the other side!"

As soon as his mind moved, this treasure stretched out like an arm, as if it were a part of his body.

He fights his own replica body, one using the Arcana of the Other Shore and the other not using the Arcana of the Other Shore.

Rumble!

The Arcana's spear shattered the defenses of another replica body with a single blow, inflicting heavy damage on it with ease.

There is a big gap in strength between each other.

And.

Ye Tian found that the Treasure of the Other Shore seemed to have really become a part of the body, and when he copied the body, the Treasure of the Other Shore was also copied, which made him extremely surprised.

In this way, even if he copies his body and falls, the treasure of the other side will not disappear.

......

this day.

The tidal period of the original black river has finally arrived.

Rumble!!!!

It was as if the speed of the endless Origin Black River was surging faster, and countless Origin Black River rivers were flowing at unimaginable speeds.

On the Origin Black River, lonely islands were covered and could no longer be seen, and everything on them was washed away.

Wind Tooth Island.

The endless source of the Black River rushed in, and it collided with the wind area of Fengya Island for the first time.

The wind in the wind area is not an ordinary wind, even the nine bone transformation realm other side level geniuses can kill, but compared to this origin black river black water that contains special tidal power, it is still a little weaker.

Bang!!!!

The river collided with the wind area, creating a terrible impact, and countless planes and planes were shattered by the impact and turned into nothingness.

After continuous collisions, the wind area was smashed apart, and a large amount of river water seeped in.

These originating black rivers roared like world-destroying dragons, trying to destroy the islands on Windtooth Island.

Many of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Wind Tooth Island were used to seeing it, so they didn't have any panic.

"Burst!"

One after another, majestic magic circles opened, blocking the waters of these Origin Black Rivers.

The impact of these Origin Black River rivers was indeed terrifying, and many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors couldn't stop it, but they couldn't help these magic arrays.

The water of the Origin Black River flowed out from all around the circle, and although it covered Fengya Island, it did not help Fengya Island.

Ye Tian, who was on Fengya Island, noticed the water of the Origin Black River, but ignored it, and he continued to practice here.

And the other side.

Ye Tian stepped into the Origin Black River from the east.

As soon as he entered, he was subjected to the impact of the river water during the tidal period of the Origin Black River, and an incomparably powerful tidal force emerged, as if a large number of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were attacking him.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was washed far away.

But soon, he stabilized, relying on the golden body on the other side and the unbreakable golden cover technique to block the impact of the Origin Black River.

However, he was very aware of his strength, and he couldn't hold out for too long in the Origin Black River.

"Hold on as long as you can, first look for the origin black mud!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to wander among the Origin Black River, searching for the existence of the Origin Black Mud.

Then.

The corpse of an Origin Black River creature was washed over.

The strength of this creature is estimated to be comparable to that of a genius on the other side of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, but in such a tidal period, it did not find a safe hiding place and fell directly to its death.

There are too many dead creatures like this, and the Origin Black River is everywhere.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian saw a cloud of black mud washed into the void above the Origin Black River, where there was still river water, but it was slightly less, but the impact was even more terrifying.

Even Ye Tian didn't dare to stay there forever.

"This should be the Origin Black Mud!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He urged the golden body on the other side and the unbroken golden cover technique with all his might, and went up to take down the origin black mud and put it away. ~
